property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: protectedPath_withInvalidToken_returns401
testcase.system-out:
21:52:22.717 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.hospital.gateway.GatewayIntegrationTest]: GatewayIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 21:52:23.205 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.hospital.gateway.GatewayServiceApplication for test class com.hospital.gateway.GatewayIntegrationTest

testcase.name: suspiciousQueryParam_returns400
testcase.system-out: 2026-03-02T21:52:47.539Z DEBUG 18288 --- [gateway-service] [ parallel-2] o.s.c.g.h.RoutePredicateHandlerMapping : Route matched: patient-service 2026-03-02T21:52:47.540Z DEBUG
